metadata.name: Handle Guest Request for Accessible Seating

description: A guest who purchased standard tickets has since broken their leg and now requires wheelchair accessible seating.

nodes.task_description: Look up the guest's original order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the guest's original ticket purchase.

nodes.task_description: Check the availability of unsold accessible seats for the event.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds an available wheelchair space with a companion seat.

nodes.task_description: Process an exchange for the guest's original tickets to the new accessible seats.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully voids the old tickets and issues the new ones.

nodes.task_description: Inform the guest of their new seat location and offer to arrange for wheelchair assistance upon arrival.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the new details and logs a request for assistance.
